positive: Stylized graphic illustration of a stylized mountain range meeting a stylized crescent moon and scattered constellations. The mountains should have a clean, crisp silhouette design, filled with abstract geometry patterns like diamonds and triangles. The night sky uses deep indigo and sapphire blue, contrasting sharply with bright metallic gold and pale cyan glows for the stars and moon. The composition must be highly balanced and symmetrical, suitable for a central chest print on an apparel item. Minimalist, tattoo flash style, vibrant two-tone color palette, vector art quality, high contrast, negative space emphasized, art deco influence.
